title: Sengoku Jidai Hooks
description: This Resourcepack changes the textures on Yori3o's Grappling Hooks mod to match the aesthetics of the Sengoku Jidai mod
body: This Resourcepack was made to be played with both, Sengoku Jidai mod by QwikSand and Yori3o's Grappling Hooks mod, by having this resourcepack enabled, the textures and names on the Hook heads, Hooks themselves and their models will change to match Sengoku Jidai's aesthetics
